title: Juzzian armlock
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''[[Juzzian]] armlock''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Unarmed combat/Legends|martial arts]] move that consisted of nerve-pincers at the wrist and elbow.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
